channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-24
item.description:
Our community has been buzzing with activity across multiple projects. The `scienceverse/metacheck` project has seen significant progress, with multiple branches merged into the `dev` branch, including `papers_databases`, `ethics_check`, and `prereg_regcheck`, demonstrating the team's commitment to integrating new features and fixes. Meanwhile, the `giladfeldman/docpluck` project has made notable strides in documentation and table fixes, particularly with the `feat/rc-t-table-region-guard` branch. Additionally, `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` and `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` have both received updates, with the former revising its validation note and adding a citation, and the latter adding a convenient Chrome Webstore link. These connections between projects highlight the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made towards advancing open-source research tools.

91 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

Most active:

coarse30 commits
regcheck28 commits
docpluck19 commits
metacheck11 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `dev` branch was the primary focus of the recent work, with multiple pull requests being merged into it. The merge of pull request #317 from the `papers_databases` branch was incorporated, as indicated by the commit message "Merge pull request #317 from scienceverse/papers_databases". The `ethics_check` branch was also merged into `dev` via pull request #316, as stated in the commit "Merge pull request #316 from scienceverse/ethics_check". Additionally, the `prereg_regcheck` branch was merged into `dev` through pull request #309, and a fix related to the code check for the paper list was applied from the `fix/code-check-paperlist` branch via pull request #318. The `fix/code-check-paperlist` branch specifically addressed an issue with the code check for the paper list, as implied by its merge into the `dev` branch.

4 commit(s) today:

  • ed8c8d3 [dev] Merge pull request #317 from scienceverse/papers_databases — Lisa DeBruine
  • e077134 [dev] Merge pull request #316 from scienceverse/ethics_check — Lisa DeBruine
  • a40d7db [dev] Merge pull request #309 from scienceverse/prereg_regcheck — Lisa DeBruine
  • 1fb2bab [dev] Merge pull request #318 from scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →
